title: Homebrew tap — punt-labs/homebrew-tap with mcp-proxy formula
Health check flag (--health) for liveness probes
refactor(cli): migrate to cobra per cli.md Go standard
description: punt-kit/standards/cli.md now specifies cobra as the Go CLI framework (PR #139). mcp-proxy uses hand-rolled or stdlib flag parsing. Migrate to cobra for consistent --flag=value support, auto-generated help, and global flag propagation. See beadle DES-014 for rationale.

title: go install support — tag versions for go install @latest
Connection status line on stderr at startup
Slice 4: quarry integration test — real MCP roundtrip through proxy
description: quarry PR #95 landed WebSocket /mcp endpoint. Write internal/integration/quarry_test.go with build tag integration. Start quarry serve, connect mcp-proxy, send initialize + tools/list + tools/call, verify responses. Requires quarry dev build available.
close_reason: Merged PR #4: quarry integration tests + mcp subprotocol fix

title: Bounded send queue during reconnect
description: Cap the stdin message queue in the reconnect package. During prolonged disconnect, unbounded queue growth could exhaust proxy memory. Add a max queue size with oldest-drop or backpressure.
close_reason: Already bounded: lines channel is make(chan []byte, 64) which provides natural backpressure. Stdin goroutine blocks when buffer is full.

title: Metrics emission (message count, bytes, uptime) to debug log
WebSocket ping/pong liveness checking
description: Send periodic WebSocket pings to the daemon. If Ping() fails (no pong within timeout), cancel the connection context to trigger reconnect. Uses coder/websocket's conn.Ping(ctx) which blocks until pong. Add Ping to the Conn interface in reconnect package. Ping interval: 30s, pong timeout: 10s.
close_reason: Implemented in same commit — ping goroutine force-disconnects on pong timeout

title: Linux .deb package via nfpm in release workflow
description: Add nfpm config to build a .deb package in the GitHub Actions release workflow. The .deb installs mcp-proxy to /usr/local/bin/. No service unit needed — mcp-proxy is a short-lived process spawned by Claude Code, not a daemon. Use nfpm (https://nfpm.goreleaser.com/) to generate the .deb from a YAML config. Attach the .deb to the GitHub Release alongside the raw binaries.

title: Reconnect on daemon restart with backoff and stdin buffering
Runtime safety guarantees
description: Epic: Strengthen mcp-proxy runtime protection so Claude Code never hangs even if the daemon misbehaves. Five sub-tasks: read deadlines, bounded send queue, WebSocket ping/pong liveness, in-flight error synthesis, static build enforcement.
close_reason: All sub-tasks complete: keepalive (5s/2s), bounded queue (already was), static build (CGO_ENABLED=0). Error synthesis deferred to P4.

title: Force-disconnect on pong timeout
description: After ping/pong is implemented (mcp-proxy-dud), add logic to force-close the connection and trigger reconnect when the daemon stops responding to pings. This is the enforcement side of liveness checking.
close_reason: Implemented in same commit — ping goroutine force-disconnects on pong timeout

title: In-flight request error synthesis on disconnect
description: Track pending JSON-RPC request IDs sent to the daemon. On disconnect, synthesize error responses for all in-flight requests and write them to stdout so Claude Code gets clean errors instead of hanging.

title: GitHub Release workflow — cross-compile + checksums on v* tag
Enforce static linking in build targets
description: Add CGO_ENABLED=0 to Makefile build/dist targets and CI workflows. Ensures the binary is truly static on all platforms, matching the README claim.
close_reason: CGO_ENABLED=0 added to Makefile build/dist and CI release workflow

title: Explicit stdin buffering during WebSocket connect
close_reason: Solved by reconnect package: channel-based stdin buffering (cap 64) buffers messages during dial
